headline: Tesla Faces Fierce New Rival in Self-Driving Race
summary: It has been assumed up until recently that the primary challenge to Tesla’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) self-driving business was Google Waymo. Other technologies from smaller companies exist. And major legacy car companies like GM (NYSE: GM) are developing their own products. There is a new challenger, and it appears to be impressive. Wayve, which is based ... headline: US Car Company Trouble As VW Lays Off 100,000
summary: Here is a huge layoff, not because of AI. VW is closing four plants, cutting back on models, and laying off 100,000 people. What is the primary reason? Among them is the fact that the Chinese are rushing into their markets with inexpensive EVs. VW and other legacy car companies can’t compete with these. Close ...
